abilities.shortEffect: Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.
abilities.effect: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.

abilities.shortEffect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.
abilities.effect: After each turn, this Pokémon has a 33% of being cured of any major status ailment.

abilities.shortEffect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
abilities.effect:
During a sandstorm, this Pokémon has 1.25× its evasion, and it does not take sandstorm damage regardless of type.

The evasion bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved in a sandstorm.
